items.question: What is CRCL implied volatility?
items.answer: CRCL currently has an implied volatility of 1.73 with an IV rank of 28.04. Implied volatility helps traders assess option pricing and potential price movements.
items.title: CRCL Volatility Analysis & Options Data | Unusual Whales

items.question: How to use CRCL volatility data for options trading?
items.answer: CRCL volatility data helps you choose the right options strategy. High IV suggests expensive options and potential mean reversion, while low IV may indicate cheap options. Use IV rank to compare current volatility to historical levels.
items.title: CRCL Volatility Analysis & Options Data | Unusual Whales

items.question: What is IV rank for CRCL?
items.answer: IV rank measures where current implied volatility sits relative to its 52-week range. CRCL's current IV rank is 28.04, helping you determine if options are relatively expensive or cheap.
